posts.author: s.kubia.12 (Sebastian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we see any tool tip in bubbel chart. When i move on bubbel i wloud like to see name of company and stage.

Now see only some information that i have on Axis and size of bubble. I need additional information. It is possible ? or Any app ?
